raw_response: {"quote": "We evaluate 23 LVLMs and observe that state-of-the-art LVLMs, including GPT-4o and Gemini 2.5 Pro, perform poorly in the basic geometric perception tasks in VisOnlyQA (48.8% and 79.0% in accuracy on the Real split), while human performance is nearly perfect (93.5%)", "location": "Abstract"}
